summary: Verified both bug fixes: 1) Inbox useFocusEffect implementation reloads conversations on tab navigation - confirmed via code review and UI test. 2) Photo URL absolutization converts relative /api/images/... paths to full URLs before inserting into SMS body. Both backend APIs working correctly.

implementation.line_1_imports: import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
implementation.lines_279-290: useEffect on [user] for initial load + useFocusEffect with useCallback to reload on every tab focus

implementation.logic: if (photoUrl && photoUrl.startsWith('/')) { baseUrl = IS_WEB ? window.location.origin : EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL; absolutePhotoUrl = baseUrl + photoUrl; }

GET /api/messages/conversations/{user_id.response: Returns array of conversation objects with _id, user_id, contact_id, contact.name, contact.phone, last_message, etc.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Both fixes verified via code review and UI testing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bugs fixed and verified: 1) Inbox now uses useFocusEffect from expo-router (lines 284-290 in inbox.tsx) to reload conversations every time the Inbox tab gains focus. 2) Photo URLs from /api/images/upload are now converted to absolute URLs (lines 1112-1118 in contact/[id].tsx) using window.location.origin before being inserted into SMS message body. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_inbox_photo_fixes.py verify conversations API returns data and image upload returns relative URLs.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered
